summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements (REQ-31 through REQ-37). REQ-31 (GST on invoice), REQ-32 (bill date field), REQ-33 (30 line items), REQ-34 (SummaryPage download), REQ-35 (CompanyReportPage download), REQ-36 (party name autocomplete), and REQ-37 (product name autocomplete) are all present. However, REQ-34 has a partial gap: the GST No. column is included in the CSV header but the actual GST values are never fetched and remain empty strings. REQ-35's CSV includes CGST and SGST columns not specified in the requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: The CSV for SummaryPage must include the GST No. column with actual values for each party.
missing_requirements.reason: In SummaryPage.tsx the downloadCSV function initializes gstMap with empty strings for all party names and never populates them with actual GST data from the backend before writing the CSV rows. The GST No. column will always be blank.

hallucinated_features.description: CompanyReportPage CSV includes CGST and SGST columns not specified in REQ-35.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-35 specifies columns: Invoice No., Bill Date, Base Amount, Final Amount, Amount Paid, Pending. The implementation adds CGST and SGST columns beyond what was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module was added to the backend.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement requested a migration module. backend/migration.mo was introduced without a corresponding requirement.
